description_for_human: Access LCC deal intelligence, daily priorities, property context, and queue management.
description_for_model: Use Life Command Center to get real CRE data. Call get_daily_briefing_snapshot for daily priorities. Call get_hot_business_contacts for prospecting targets. Call search_entity_targets to find properties or contacts. Call get_pipeline_intelligence for deal pipeline status. Call get_work_counts for task counts.

functions.name: get_daily_briefing_snapshot
functions.description: Get today's prioritized daily briefing with deal responses, pipeline status, and action items. Call this when the user asks what to focus on, for a morning briefing, or daily priorities.

functions.name: get_hot_business_contacts
functions.description: List high-priority contacts for outreach with engagement scores and recent activity. Call this when user asks who to call, prospecting targets, or warm contacts.

functions.name: search_entity_targets
functions.description: Search for properties, contacts, or organizations by name. Call this when user asks about a specific property, contact, or company.

functions.name: get_pipeline_intelligence
functions.description: Get deal pipeline health including velocity, conversion rates, and bottlenecks. Call this when user asks about pipeline, deals, or what is stuck.

functions.name: get_work_counts
functions.description: Get aggregate work counts including open actions, inbox items, and overdue tasks. Call this when user asks about workload, task counts, or what is overdue.
